name: Time Fracture
description: Time Fracture is a fast-paced sci-fi arcade game where time itself becomes your weapon and your enemy. Run through unstable zones, slow time using energy control, survive gravity failures, ghost anomalies, and time jammers. Each day brings a unique daily protocol with new modifiers, making every run different. Test your reflexes, timing, and skill as difficulty increases the longer you survive. Can you stay synchronized, or will the system collapse? Play daily, master the anomalies, and achieve the highest sync score.
instructions: Click Tap Space ndash Jump Hold ndash Slow Time Release ndash Resume Time
